title: Goals
scope: Goals, projects, and tasks — the platform's project-management core that every other app links to for context. A three-level hierarchy (goal → project → task/subtask) with notes, ordering, dependencies, due reminders, Trello integration, and a PM thinking domain that nudges and flags at-risk items. NOT lightweight to-dos (the Todo app) — this is structured, linked project management.

specs.title: Create a goal
specs.behavior: Creating a goal records a top-level objective and assigns a g- id.

specs.title: Create a project
specs.behavior: Creating a project records a p- entity under a goal.

specs.title: Create a task
specs.behavior: Creating a task records a t- entity under a project, or a subtask under another task.

specs.title: Update a goal/project/task
specs.behavior: Updating changes any goal, project, or task's fields (status, name, dates, assignee, etc.).

specs.title: Delete a goal/project/task
specs.behavior: Deleting permanently removes a goal, project, or task.

specs.title: Get an entity's full record
specs.behavior: Getting an entity detail returns the full record for any goal, project, or task — fields, notes, history, artifacts, and linked entities.

specs.title: Goals overview
specs.behavior: The goals summary lists the user's goals with progress percentages.

specs.title: Goal detail
specs.behavior: Goal detail returns a goal's info plus its project list with progress.

specs.title: Project detail
specs.behavior: Project detail returns a project's full task tree — milestones, subtasks, and uncategorized tasks with their ranks.

specs.title: My tasks
specs.behavior: My tasks returns all tasks assigned to a person across every goal and project.

specs.title: Search goals/projects/tasks
specs.behavior: Searching matches across goals, projects, and tasks by keyword over names, notes, and history.

specs.title: Read/update the notes document
specs.behavior: Notes operations read, replace, and append to a goal/project/task's stable NOTES document.

specs.title: Set a due-date reminder
specs.behavior: Setting a due reminder creates a reminder for a goal/project/task's due date.

specs.title: Set stack-rank order
specs.behavior: Order operations set the stack-rank order of goals globally, of projects within a goal, and of tasks within a project.

specs.title: Set dependencies
specs.behavior: Dependency operations declare which other goals/projects/tasks must complete before a given one.

specs.title: Reparent a task
specs.behavior: Reparenting moves a task to be a subtask of another task.

specs.title: Enable/disable project nagging
specs.behavior: Project nagging can be turned on or off, controlling whether the PM domain auto-nags about a project.

specs.title: Stop onboarding
specs.behavior: Stopping onboarding closes out the first-run 'Get started with Skipper' goal so its nudges cease.

specs.title: Link/unlink a project to Trello
specs.behavior: Linking connects a project to a Trello board for live task↔card integration; unlinking removes it.

specs.title: Create/adopt a Trello task
specs.behavior: Trello-task operations create a new Trello-linked task under a project or adopt an existing Trello card into the project as a linked task.

specs.title: Check a Trello checklist item
specs.behavior: Checking toggles a checklist item on a Trello-linked task.
